login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to BANA Wallet
login.googleError: Could not start Google sign-in. Please try again.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with BANA Wallet
signup.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

admin.brokerAccessBody: The admin area is only available to <highlight>Admin accounts</highlight>. Sign in with an admin account to continue.

settlement.pageSubtitle: Broker / Admin — commissions, settlements, and tenant overview.
settlement.historyError: Could not load settlement history. Ensure the backend is running.
settlement.noSettlementsBody: Commission settlements between the hub and your broker account will appear here.
settlement.adminNoteBody: As the <highlight>admin / broker</highlight>, you manage users and collect commissions. End-user wallets and funding are created on the Nia-Hub side; this panel reflects your tenant’s real settlement data via the API key.
settlement.accessDeniedBody: The Settlement panel is only available to <highlight>Admin accounts</highlight>. Sign in with an admin account to access commission and settlement data.

dashboard.allocationInfoBody: How your portfolio is split across tokens, by percentage of total value. Hover a ring segment to see that token's share. Rebalance via Swap to adjust it.
dashboard.noAssetsTitle: No assets yet — fund your account to see your portfolio
dashboard.noAssetsBody: Deposit crypto to your BANA wallet address and your balances will appear here.
dashboard.assetsWithBalance: {count, plural, one {# asset with non-zero balance} other {# assets with non-zero balance}}
dashboard.footerBody: Secure private keys remain strictly off-network. High-precision hardware consensus algorithms verified.

swap.pageSubtitle: Direct liquidity routing with private MEV Shielding. No sandboxing.
swap.scenarioBody: Swap can route through dynamic assets. Toggle this to audit our system's reaction inside the simulator!
swap.mevProtectedBody: Your transaction is routed through a private RPC to skip sandwich attacks, frontrunning, and slippage leakages.

staking.pageSubtitle: Lock assets to help secure the network and earn passive yield rewards.
staking.whatIsStakingBody: Staking locks your tokens to help validate and secure the blockchain. In return you earn rewards (shown as APY — annual percentage yield). Your keys stay self-custodial; assets in a lock period can't be moved until the timer ends.

deposit.pageSubtitle: Receive assets into your Nia custody account.
deposit.addressUnavailable: On-chain deposit address generation is not yet available for this account.
deposit.addressUnavailableContact: To get your {asset} deposit address, contact your account manager or <support>reach out to BANA support</support>.
deposit.warning: Only send {asset} on the {chain} network to the address provided by your account manager. Sending to an incorrect address or network may result in permanent loss.
deposit.qrUnavailable: QR code unavailable — deposit address not yet provisioned for this account.

walletPage.title: Wallet
walletPage.subtitle: User account — deposit, withdraw, and review balances.
walletPage.backendUnreachable: Couldn't reach the backend (run npm run server).
walletPage.noBalancesBody: This user has no funds. Once a funded user is configured, balances appear here automatically.

withdraw.pageSubtitle: Send assets from your Nia custody account to an external address.
withdraw.withdrawalRequestedBody: Your request to withdraw {amount} {asset} has been submitted to Nia-Hub for processing.
withdraw.irreversibleWarning: Withdrawals are irreversible. Double-check the destination address — funds sent to a wrong address cannot be recovered.
withdraw.noBalanceHint: No {asset} available to withdraw — deposit first.

settings.pageSubtitle: Adjust private routing nodes, consensus gas speed thresholds, and MEV front-run firewalls.
settings.googleNoPassword: This account signs in with Google, so there's no password to change here. Manage it from your Google account.
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
settings.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
settings.niaKeysBody: Your Nia-Hub keys live securely on the BANA backend (.env) and are never exposed to the browser. This shows the live connection status.
settings.startServerHint: Start it with npm run server (it proxies /api to :8787).
settings.addKeysHint: Add NIA_API_KEY / NIA_API_SECRET to .env, then restart the server
settings.secretNote: The API secret stays in the server's .env file and is <highlight>never sent to the browser</highlight>.
settings.walletBody: This is your verified self-custody wallet address hosting your Institutional Vault funds. Keep private keys offline.
settings.rpcBody: Configure your network relay client connection endpoint. Custom endpoints may alter latency.
settings.mevBody: Toggle secure BANA Private Router tunnel proxying.
settings.mevOn: BANA Private Shield prevents mempool crawlers from sandboxing or copy-trading your swaps.
settings.mevOff: Security Alert: Disabling protection leaves swaps vulnerable to sandwich slippage bots.
settings.gasBody: Select default priority block coverage speeds. Fast and Instant bypass network traffic queues.
settings.slippageBody: Protect trade output amounts by reverting swaps that leak capital past predefined parameters.
settings.slippageVeryHigh: Very high slippage — trades may lose significant value.
settings.notificationsBody: Choose which activity appears in your notification feed.

activity.pageSubtitle: Full cryptographic execution trails synced across private RPC block indexing relays.
activity.noActivity: No corresponding transaction activities recorded under filter "{filter}"
activity.liveRecords: Live • {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} from Nia-Hub
activity.demoData: Demo data — no live activity yet

simulate.pageSubtitle: Stateful EVM Execution Trace before chain dispatching • Block 20128919
simulate.check4Desc: Private relayer validated via BANA Shield
simulate.advisoryBody: Our sandbox flagged <highlight>1 warning alert</highlight> on the contract bytecode representation. Click this panel immediately to audit the potential rug-pull / slippage vulnerability index before executing.
simulate.proceedBody: Confirming will execute the transaction in full. The assets will be updated immediately. Rejecting will clear the memory and exit.

scamWarning.intro: The target contract you are attempting to interact with has failed multiple BANA Institutional Vault security audits.
scamWarning.honeypotBody: The smart contract contains code designed to restrict token transfers. Buyers can purchase, but cannot sell or transfer the assets.
scamWarning.blacklistBody: The contract deployer address holds malicious status alerts on base chain registry indexes.
scamWarning.slippageBody: Slippage index exceeds 15% due to simulated pool dilution, indicating potential sandwich capital exit.
scamWarning.agreement: I understand that by proceeding, I bypass all BANA firewall rules and assume full responsibility for any irreversible loss of simulated capital.
